data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Guest privileges (bring friend once/month)', but the evidence does not confirm that this specific functionality is implemented or tracked. While the linked use case mentions guest privileges, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided that demonstrate the existence or enforcement of this feature. The evidence primarily focuses on booking and payment processes without addressing the guest pass functionality directly, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation or tracking of guest privileges for bringing a friend once a month.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint to validate guest privileges
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the guest privileges functionality.
